properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C4 V5 C6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: A desire is burning in my heart To draw closer to You, Lord I've been living too far apart Obedient I want to be You're living inside of me I know You'll settle for nothing less Than to look at me and see Yourself

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: So hide me away, oh Lord In Your bosom I want to be Into Your secret place It's my deepest desire Lord Oh, all of You oh Lord I'm crying out prayerfully Seeking Your holy face For all that You've promised me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Lord I had many victories before But now I see this world is shaking My life is shaking Lord I need You even more The enemy is at the door He's determined to destroy me But I will live a victorious life Like Jesus Christ Lord, take all that is not of Thee

verse.name: C4
verse.lines: And hide me away, oh Lord In Your bosom I want to be Into Your secret place My deepest desire Lord It's all of You oh Lord I'm crying out prayerfully Seeking Your holy face For all that You've promised me

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: And I believe You'll answer prayer Lord I believe You'll answer prayer With all my heart I believe you'll answer prayer As I call on Thee, I call on You, Lord For I know you'll answer prayer You did it for Jonah Lord I know you'll answer prayer Lord I know you'll answer my prayer As I call on Thee

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: So hide me away, oh Lord In Your bosom I want to be Into Your secret place It's my deepest desire Lord It's all of You oh Lord I'm crying out prayerfully Seeking Your holy face For all that You've promised me
